scripts.build: npm run build -w @downstroke/core && npm run build -w @downstroke/spec && npm run build -w @downstroke/agents && npm run build -w @downstroke/gates && npm run build -w @downstroke/presets && npm run build -w downstroke-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @downstroke/core && npm run typecheck -w @downstroke/spec && npm run typecheck -w @downstroke/agents && npm run typecheck -w @downstroke/gates && npm run typecheck -w @downstroke/presets && npm run typecheck -w downstroke-cli
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test packages/core/test/*.test.mjs apps/cli/test/*.test.mjs
